output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct ReadLimitInfo {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t read_limit;
    bool occurred;
};

ReadLimitInfo catch_stream_read_limit() {
    try {
        // Trigger a stream_read_limit exception with example values
        throw hexi::stream_read_limit(100, 500, 600);
    } catch (const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
        ReadLimitInfo info;
        info.read_size = e.read_size;
        info.total_read = e.total_read;
        info.read_limit = e.read_limit;
        info.occurred = true;
        return info;
    }
}

ReadLimitInfo safe_read_with_limit_check(hexi::pmc::binary_stream& stream, void* destination, std::size_t length) {
    ReadLimitInfo info{0, 0, 0, false};
    
    try {
        stream.read(destination, length);
    } catch (const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
        info.read_size = e.read_size;
        info.total_read = e.total_read;
        info.read_limit = e.read_limit;
        info.occurred = true;
    }
    
    return info;
}
```</answer>

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    stream.write(&big_message_id, sizeof(big_message_id));

    }

    // Write checksum
    const auto big_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(&big_checksum, sizeof(big_checksum));

    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum);

}
